scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c orange,blue "npm run dev -w @launchreel/api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @launchreel/api && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @launchreel/api && python3 -m unittest discover -s packages/video-deconstruct/tests -v
scripts.vercel:build: npx convex deploy --cmd "npm run build -w web"
